name: Dr. Wu Skincare Co., Ltd.
summary: Dr. Wu Skincare Co., Ltd. develops and sells skincare products in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers cleansers, masks, toners, serums, moisturizers, and sunscreen and eye care products, as well as makeup and body products. It also provides products for acne and pores, hydration, lines and wrinkles, brightening, body care, sensitive skin, and radiant health. The company offers its products through a network of approximately 2200 sales points, as well as e-commerce sales channels. Dr. Wu Skincare Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
